title: Marilyn Camps
description: On the evening of March 1, 2026, Marilyn Camps passed away peacefully in the apartment she loved in Bozeman, Montana. The youngest of eleven children in the Johnson family, Marilyn grew up in the Los Angeles area. Growing up during the Great Depression meant families found creative ways to make ends meet.
